channel.title: MediTime - Medication Management Updates
channel.description: Latest updates and news from MediTime, your smart medication tracker

item.title: MediTime 0.1.0 Released - Your Smart Medication Companion
item.description:
We're excited to announce the launch of MediTime, your smart medication management companion!

Key Features:

  • 📱 Smart medication reminders and notifications
  • 📅 Medical calendar sharing with family and caregivers
  • 💊 Prescription and pill tracking
  • 📦 Pillbox and stock management
  • 🌍 Support for 9 languages
  • 📴 Offline access and sync
  • 📤 Export calendars to ICS format
  • 📷 QR code scanning for medications

Never miss a dose again with MediTime!
